title: Hacksaw, Mini Hacksaw Set with 10 Blades, Professional Junior Hack Saw for Metal, PVC, Plastic, Wood Cutting, Small Hand Saw with Adjustable Frame, Heavy Duty Compact Hacksaws Tool for Repair(Red)
features: 【PORTABLE & MULTI-PURPOSE】Compact and lightweight, this junior hacksaw is easy to carry and perfect for home, workshop, or outdoor use. Ideal as a metal saw, coping saw, or hack saw to cut metal, plastic, wood, and more

【DUAL-INJECTION ANTI-SLIP HANDLE】Features a double-injection molded handle designed for ergonomic comfort. The anti-slip grip allows for secure handling during extended use, making it a reliable metal cutting saw for precision tasks

【INTEGRATED ALUMINUM FRAME】The hacksaw frame is forged from a single piece of aluminum alloy with a rust-resistant painted finish. This heavy-duty build ensures durability and wear resistance, ideal for demanding cutting jobs

【ADJUSTABLE TENSION KNOB】Equipped with a rotating tension knob that allows quick and easy blade replacement. This user-friendly feature adds convenience when switching between different types of junior hacksaw blades for various materials

【DURABLE MINI SAW BLADES】Comes with high carbon steel mini blades that are sharp, wear-resistant, and versatile. Whether you're cutting through metal, PVC, or wood, this set delivers precise results every time

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Ergonomic Handle, Adjustable Tension Knob, Durable Frame
